shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot standing before a launch pad with a growing subscriber list, representing the pre-launch community concept.
assets.caption: Product Hunt Ship — distribution before the product exists.
assets.prompt: Product Hunt Ship | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a stylized launch pad with a "COMING SOON" sign, holding a clipboard with a growing list of subscribers. The background is a warm cream, and the subscriber count on the sign is visibly increasing. Cap tilted, friendly expression, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at a launch day calendar surrounded by empty chairs, illustrating the cold-start problem.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at a launch day calendar surrounded by empty chairs, illustrating the cold-start problem.
assets.prompt: Product Hunt Ship | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing toward a calendar with "Launch Day" circled, surrounded by empty chairs representing an absent audience. The scene communicates the cold-start problem: a maker appearing on launch day with no existing community. Cream background, no speech bubble, no copy. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. assets.caption: Hatch observing a pipeline connecting a maker building to a launch moment through subscriber collection.
assets.prompt: Product Hunt Ship | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at two connected panels: on the left, a maker building a product; on the right, a growing list of subscriber names flowing toward a "LAUNCH" moment. An arrow connects the two panels through a Product Hunt logo. The visual shows pre-launch audience collection as a pipeline. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. assets.alt: Hatch pointing at a chart showing the advantage of pre-launch subscriber collection versus launching cold.
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at a chart showing the advantage of pre-launch subscriber collection versus launching cold.
assets.prompt: Product Hunt Ship | evidence-card: Hatch pointing at a simple chart showing two lines: "launch with Ship subscribers" tracking upward versus "launch without pre-launch audience" tracking flat.
